title: Incredibly Flaky Syrian Chicken Roast
description: A kid-friendly Syrian dish featuring citrusy flavors and a beautiful yellow color from food coloring, perfect for a family dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
Place the chicken on the baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
After 45 minutes, brush the chicken with the pan juices and add the yellow food coloring to the pan juices.
Return the chicken to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the internal temperature reaches 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
